review_text: Lovely cabin and location. Cabin very spacious and clean.
Very clean and neat house. A little negative thing is that the pillows are too hard and there is no dish washer

Unfortunately, the experience did not meet expectations for several reasons.

The condition of the room was a primary concern, as the accommodations appeared outdated. More importantly, there were significant issues with hygiene and cleanliness, which were particularly distressing as I was traveling with two children. The room contained a large number of flies, and we noted a similar issue with insects covering the exterior of our vehicle.

Furthermore, the condition of the grounds, specifically the dusty and gravel surfaces in non-concreted areas, contributed to an unpleasant environment. It appears that the housekeeping and general maintenance standards are currently insufficient.

I hope you will take this feedback into consideration to improve the experience for future guests.
Best kept holiday park I've stayed in.
Very good experience. Kids enjoyed whole holiday break here.
Great place for families and business alike, loved it

My son and I stayed in a studio room with Ensuite. I have never stayed at a BIG4 before and were super impressed.
The room was clean and tidy, the check-in service was friendly and well informed.
The grounds were clean and there was many things to keep my 8yr old entertained.
I cannot fault this place honestly and would stay here again if I ever need to.
Good facilities and a nice park, but poor customer service. Unfortunately, that side of things really impacts the overall experience
It never disappoints

Have just spent 2 days at your park and could not have been happier. Amenities are spotless, well maintained and warm. The grounds are manicured and staff very friendly. Caravan sites have concrete pad and are well marked and size more than adequate. Will recommend and return.
PS Although we did not avail them, noted great holiday options for the families too.

Fantastic staff and well managed site..
Couldn't ask for more...
Easy access to our en suite site. Little too cold for the lovely spa pool area

Great park, Clean Ammenities, Great Location - Only fault I had was their customer service, I requested if I could check in a few hours earlier with my Perks Membership, they declined as I would be able to use their facilities? I've paid for the day anyway, and their boom gates don't work - so anyone could come in at any time of the day/or night to use them anyway.. Very disappointed as I've never had issues checking-in earlier at other Big4s. I won't be returning, but I will be taking my business back to the Big4 I usually stay in Bendigo.

One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in. Amenities were spotlessly clean. Staff were friendly and helpful. They have lovely clean sites with concrete slabs and a nice grassy lawn right beside the concrete. Cost of overnight stay was very good, not outrageous like some we have seen.

My wife and I recently stayed in one of the new glamping caravans at Tasman Holiday Park in Bendigo and absolutely loved it. The whole setup is incredibly cute and thoughtfully designed, with an amazing attention to detail. Everything you could possibly need for a perfect night away has already been thought of and included.

The vibe is cozy, stylish, and a little bit special — it feels like a fun mix of camping and boutique accommodation. You get the charm of being outdoors but with all the comforts that make it relaxing rather than roughing it.

It’s clear a lot of care has gone into creating these spaces, and it really shows. We had such a great time and would happily stay again. Highly recommend if you’re looking for a unique and charming little getaway.

We have just spent a night at the Big 4 Tasman Caravan Park Bendigo and wanted to put a review after a very pleasant experience - the best we have seen. We had a powered site and found it was well set out with a shaded grassed area and concrete slab that felt private. The amenities were excellent - great showers with a shower curtain extremely clean and well set out. The dump point was a work of art - it was housed in a special room and spotlessly clean. It is a well thought out caravan park with things for everyone - “the hub”, a mini gym, an air conditioned beautiful kitchen with gas bbqs adjoining that area, a kids area, putt-putt. There were cabins and glamping tents and retro vans. The receptionist was very helpful. We were very Impressed and wanted to recommend it to others who are visiting Bendigo. Davenjude.

Good little caravan park. Cabins could use a little upgrade - especially air con. The air con didn't work great and with one unit in the lounge and 1 in 1 of the back rooms, there were still 2 rooms with no air con and during 37 degree weather it was uncomfortable.

Comfy beds, bathrooms could use a little TLC and the toilet paper could be upgraded from 1 ply
Absolutely spotless.  Lovely site. We had our motorhome and tow car. Pool clean. Amenities always tip top.  We liked the location for access to bendigo.
Great place to put up your feet for a few days.

Well laid out park, spacious sites, well cared for grounds. Lots of things to occupy kids. |Amenities are large and absolutely spotless. Cleaned several times every day.|Need a car to get around, not too many shops close.
Stayed in the Vibtage Caravan, Patty, and cannot wait to do it again !! Amazing customer service. Everything is clean and well maintained. Congratulations for a great holiday destination
Clean and quiet amenities very clean park well maintained and staff very good to deal with

Unfortunately they have too many cabins/sites in their park now and they can not get enough electricity to all sites. Had fuses go and then issues with the pole as drawing more power than they have access too. Recommend to not go in summer when you need AC or in winter when you need a heater. We spent hours sitting in a pub trying to stay cool!

Great caravan park. It has great facilities for everyone especially families with children and is very clean.

The ladies in the office were friendly and very helpful.

I have stayed here previously and thoroughly enjoyed my experience. Recently, I attempted to book accommodation for this coming weekend and initially spoke with a lovely staff member who was extremely helpful and assisted me with my enquiries. I was advised that booking directly could offer a better rate than third-party platforms, which had been beneficial on a previous stay for myself ,

I asked if I could call back within 10 minutes to confirm details with my partner and other guests, and was told this would be fine.

When I called back shortly after, I spoke with a different staff member who was noticeably less courteous. The quoted price had increased by $20 compared to what I was initially advised.

While this amount was not significant, Booking.com was offering a cheaper rate. I explained that if the original price could not be honoured, I would proceed with booking online instead.

After thanking the staff member for their time, I immediately attempted to book through Booking.com and Wotif, only to find that prices on both platforms had increased by over $200.

This sudden change was extremely disappointing and felt unprofessional. I believe the staff member’s name was Helen.
Unfortunately, this experience has left a very poor impression and has resulted in the loss of my business. I hope management can review this situation and provide appropriate customer service training to prevent similar issues in the future- as this lady should not be dealing with customers.
It is a very clean park, the moment a caravan pulls out the groundsman go over the site, and if need be put the sprinkler on. The pool was spotless.
Beautiful park awesome staff fantastic facilities

Amazing facilities and really clean. A special mention to Chris the maintenance guy who was really accommodating especially for someone thats in a wheelchair. Chris knocked up a ramp for me to make things more accessible
Our whole family loved this caravan park. It was a shame that we couldn’t stay longer. Fantastic free activities and additional school holiday activities. Beautifully clean and tidy.
Out of town a bit but lovely caravan park well looked after very clean

Very nice park. Extremely clean amenities. Tons of facilities / things to do if you have kids or just like to do things on your holiday. Also good for sitting and doing nothing. Not super quiet but not too bad. Did smell like cattle the day we arrived, not sure if that's due to proximity of race course or something else, but it seems to have subsided. Can hear the trains and the main road nearby but it's not too loud. Nice grass for camping. Good shade without worrying a gum tree is going to drop a branch on you while you're sleeping. The office sells icecreams.

Close to the rail line so trains all night
Impersonal "computer only " staff interactions .
Inferred I was a liar or idiot no appologies for their app not working on my phone
Rubbish cutlery , i have melted better in my foundry .
Cheap & nasty all the way , everything cut to bare minimum
Disgustingly poor staff training up to & including telling me some one was new to cove their mistakes and try to shift blame onto me .
Pretend friendliness felt so fake as to make me unwelcome
Thoroughly enjoyed our stay here.  The park is immaculate.Facilities are spotless and the staff very welcoming and helpful.  We will definitely be back.
Great 2 bedroom cabin in this lovely park. Comfortable beds, great shower, toiletries provided, roomy cabin. Park has BBQs in several places, well maintained grounds.|Friendly staff at check in.

They wanted $90 for a powered site for a motorhome.  I declined, explaining that this made them one of the most expensive caravan parks in Australia.  There are plenty of others that are cheaper.  Drive past.

Very clean park and cabins but be aware that 2 bathrooms in a cabin may mean 1 bathroom with shower and toilet and just 1 toilet! A range of facilities for kids however the mini golf is VERY tired. (Eg can’t read the hole numbers). Pool isn’t heated. Good bbq facilities. Lastly VERY expensive -$1009 for 2 nights in Platinum Villa.  (Not only my thoughts as I was in the office when a van arrived. Man was told $90 for one night for site.) Our annual family reunion group (34 this year) will likely look elsewhere for next year.

Wish they told me kids were tricker treating here for Halloween my nephew's American and he loves it . Could've done something spooky even us workers here would've went with it kids need happy memories . And you should build a deck so  people can see the  horses next door horses are therapy animals it'll make you more money wine and watching horse

Incredibly rude woman behind counter.
Wouldn’t simply walk to my site and view the problem with the power point. Instead insisted that I buy an adapter. I spoke to an electrician and was assured that she doesn’t know what she’s talking about.
Don’t go there.
Great park, very clean and modern with friendly,  helpful staff.
Great caravan park, good location, cabin was very clean. Pool looked amazing.

Perfect night stay here!

Stayed in the Pooch pad and it had everything that was needed so very grateful.

Very clean and tidy park with great amenities! Will happily stay again ◡̈

One of the best and cleanest caravan parks I have ever stayed at. Shower block was spotless. Went during school holidays and the staff ran marshmallow toasting over the open fire for the kids and pancake breakfasts as well. My son had a ball. Awesome park. We will be back!

Stayed on a powered site for a couple of nights during a business trip. Very helpful and nice front desk staff. Ample space on site for the van and overall a very peaceful, clean and well managed park. Will be back again.

Cleanest park we have ever been to. Staff were awesome and very welcoming.
Heated floors in the showers was just a bonus.

Great place to stay with kids! I only found that the kitchen was tiny (staying at 6 p economic cabin) and the electric blankets didn’t work. But it was very clean, everything you need to cook, the best part, kids can play at the indoor play center if there is rain. They also have a warmed spa which was nice to have on your own for 30min. Marshmallow by the fire at night for the kids! Really really nice!! Thank you! Will be back :)

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We stayed 3 days September 2025
This was by far the cleanest caravan we’ve ever stayed in absolutely spotless! The play equipment and outdoor spaces were so well designed and exciting for the kids, with every detail thoughtfully planned out. The whole environment was amazing and made our stay so enjoyable. To top it all off, the staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming. You can really see how much care has gone into creating such a great place for families. Highly recommend!
Awesome place to stay. Heaps for the kids to do. Will definitely come back glamping and a swim.
Easy, comfortable and welcoming. Ill come back

Best caravan park we've been to on our lap of Oz so far. Clean amenities, friendly staff. Even has  gym, spa and office facilities! Friday night they light the fire and bring the  marshmallows for clients. Has a mix of sites and cabins | Highly recommend this park

Absolutely beautiful van park.  Last time we were in Bendigo area we stayed out at Marong and reviewed that park as one of the best we have stayed in.  This park is right up there as well.  Beautifully maintained grounds, amenities, pool and spa area.  Staff were friendly, and helpful.
Bendigo itself is a beautiful city and we will be back.  Would definitely stay in this park again and have no hesitation in recommending to others.

Excellent range of accommodation at reasonable rates. Plenty of options to keep the children entertained with a jumping pillow, mini golf, play ground, half basketball court, pool, spa, toddler's play room and recreation room with games and Tv.

Comfortable and good value for money. Having the cabins warm when I arrived was a nice touch. |Bed Comfortable, shower clean. |This is an older cabin, there are newer ones on the property. |Fine for one night.

What an amazing park for anyone with kids or even just a couple, hubby described it as Disney land for kids. The ammenities were the cleanest ever seen. So much to do or just relax. Definitely going back
Great service. Great site. We’d happily return.

Wow 😮 What a clean, neat well run park. Has everything you need if travelling with a Motorhome/Caravan. The most looked after amenities I’ve seen in any park so far. Staff were really nice and friendly too.

We loved staying at The BIG 4 Tasman Holiday Park in White Hills, Bendigo. We had a very quiet unmade caravan site close to the racetrack which was fully powered and had water.
The Reception staff were very helpful and polite. The kitchen and bathroom facilities were extremely clean. Terrific Games room  (The Hub) which included a table tennis.

This has always been a beautiful place to stay. My partner and I have stayed here before, and more recently, my mother and father-in-law stayed as well. The caravan park itself is fantastic, but what truly stands out is the incredible care and service from Rod and the team.

Sadly, my father-in-law passed away unexpectedly during their stay, and the way they supported my mother-in-law was beyond kind—providing flowers, meals, a place to stay, and even refunding the trip. Their thoughtfulness helped bring comfort during such a difficult time.

Rod and the team will always hold a special place in our hearts for the compassion they showed when it was needed most.
Impressive park to visit with clean Amenities and helpful staff to assist

So many great facilities.
Lots of accommodation options.
Bit out of cbd.

Great location and great service from front of house to service staff. Staying in a caravan park with a week of rain not once did I see foot prints on the white tiled community bathrooms. Clean and well maintained even van sites were cleaned during the rain. Wouldn't hesitate to stay again.
Friendly staff, clean, well maintained facilities. Central to cbd
Great place and location

BIG4 Tasman Holiday Parks Bendigo is great!!!! I love the pump track and the jumping pillow. both are very fun for kids. The minigolf was also quite fun. The only thing i would recommend is adding a heated pool because in winter it would be great. but it is still good for summer.
Very clean and well appointed.

We stayed at a powered site in our van.  The facilities are exceptional and the staff I met were very helpful, polite and accommodating.  It is one of the best caravan parks we have stayed at and reasonably priced for what it has.  The showers and toilet facilities were spotless.   Exceptionally clean and very quiet.  Will definitely stay there again.
Lovely clean park. Very impressed

A lovely spot on the Wimera River.
The camp kitchen was modern, roomy,with everything you need.
Unsuite site was not so good. It desperately needed to be upgraded.
Great place for the kids & nice Glamping
Great little spot very central to bendigo, great kid spaces and excellent customer service, showers are fantastic and would recommend for young families.
Management and staff top notch, second time staying here, cannot fault amenities and staff. Hopefully will return to Bendigo soon
Great spot! Lots to do in Bendigo.
Wonderful experience! Would attend again

Helpful and friendly staff, easy access to a drop box facility for a late check in and an easy check out.
Heating was turned on in the cabin for a beautiful welcoming feeling, everything was spotless and sheets were lovely and soft. Would highly recommend 👌

A dog friendly cvan park located 10mins from Bendigo CBD. Staff welcoming and accommodating, and park very well maintained. We opted for an en-suite site that was large, had a concrete pad and natural green grass which my dog enjoyed. The site also faced the warming winter sun each day. Highly recommended. Communal firepit on weekends was appreciated
We had a huge grassy site perfect for our two doggos. Very clean amenities and brand new laundry equipment. Staff were friendly and helpful. Can't fault this park at all. Thanks for having us! 😊

Was an amazing park, clean great facilities and quiet. Staff were very helpful and friendly.  Beds were comfortable and lots of room for kids. The shower had great pressure and hot water aplenty. Would definitely stay again.
It was a nice holiday and it has an indoor playground a playground jumping pillow pool and the tv had nearly every streaming service I would definitely come back here again

Location is great. Cabin size is big and comfortable to still have space to relax. Will I go back with my family and kids? NO! The mattresses were uncomfortable. Kitchen and bathroom areas was not cleaned. Dried food left on plates, coffee marks on mugs. Floorboards and carpet were duty. Cleaning in this big4 park was very disappointing. Iv been to other big4 parks and there were always cleaners and stuff out and about cleaning. There was no one to been seen at any given time. Pool and sauna area was unattended by stuff during the open times. Other people were complaining about the same thing when speaking to them in the outside game and family room. Disappointing. I just wished all big4 parks had the same rules and regulations applied throughout their parks.
Apart from that, no regrets on our trips but i spent time cleaning and washing which was no problem until i got annoyed because I made sure I left the place cleaner than how I walked in.
Great location when spending most of the time out and about. Do keep in mind you need to do your own service and cleaning.
Cleaning service needs better attention with refilling items, Internet service is crap especially if the park is quite full but otherwise staff were friendly and the park was quite
Clamping tent was awesome, would definitely go and stay again.

This Big 4 Holiday Park is a beauty.
From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed by the lovely Chloe who was both friendly and professional.
We booked an ensuite site for our motorhome.
Each site is quite private with a lush grassy space separating vans.
The ensuite was spacious, modern and very clean. Instant hot water is always welcomed.
The park itself is very family friendly with a beautiful pool, giant chess set, basketball court and more.
The maintenance and cleaning crews are to be congratulated on their constant effort to ensure the grounds are kept to a high standard.
A short drive takes you into historical Bendigo with its magnificent buildings and history! We orientated ourselves to the city with a hop on hop off tram ride.
Another plus is that this park is a short walk to the Bendigo Race track, which we made the most of on a Tuesday race.
Highly recommend!

We stayed in a glamping tent at this park. Very cute accommodation. The park is lovely and clean, very well maintained. Park staff were very friendly and helpful with our children helping them into the hire bikes. There’s a great rec room with couches and tvs and the spar and pool very clean. A lovely stay for families! Well done guys. All facilities very clean and well maintained!

One of the best van parks we've stayed in, in our vanning adventures. Designated bike path from White Hills Botanical Garden along the Bendigo Creek into town and the main botanical gardens. Loved the indoor dump point, cleanest most user friendly facility we've come across.

Lovely small caravan park, close to the Botanical gardens for walks and cafe. Close to the Bendigo creek Bikeway for trips to the CBD. Very nice ensuite for van site and beautiful gardens for a very pleasant stay.

We stayed over Easter wanting to spend 3 nights in a caravan and were forced to stay 4. Because it was Easter, we were charged  over $500.00 for the four nights.
We coughed up for this amount as we booked late.
But more than that, the hotrod show  was in town. The park was full of hotrods and their self-absorbed owners. They were noisy  morning, noon, and night, blew up plumes of dust over our site every time one drove by, and belched strong fumes.
I have never made one complaint ever about any park we've stayed in, and I feel, on this occasion, we had been completely dudded. Plus, when I made the complaint, the owner really couldn't have cared less. Thanks for nothing Bendigo, its a nice park, but the worst we've ever stayed in. Also you are EXTREMELY GREEDY.

Absolutely awesome park, one of the best we have stayed in. The staff are very friendly and helpful, facilities are like new and always clean, showers have heated floors 👌. Communal fire pit, great recreation room and kitchen is seperate with large oven. Highly recommend this Park.
Great park great for kids jumping pillow mini golf to recreation room

One of the best caravan parks I've stayed in. Extremely neat and spacious sites. Amenities are wonderful, camp kitchen and pool area. In a great location not far from the main town centre. Highly recommend this park. 👍👍👍👍👍

Didn't sleep much of dog barking middle of. The night, I rang the reception if I can have another hour of sleep to check out at 11 am instead of 10am telling them of reason unfortunately she told me I have to pay add$50 for the hour ooooww! Didn't get any consideration

What a great park.  We stayed there in our Caravan.  Large grass site, amenities very clean, park very well kept.  Close to the town, the staff were very helpful and friendly.  We will definitely be coming back again.  Next time we will stay longer to enjoy all the things to do in Bendigo, beautiful building, parks, gardens, Museums etc. The town itself is very clean.  Definitely worth staying.

We were looking after our grandson while my daughter was having a baby( we live in Melbourne), and the park was a life saver in keeping him amused ( 15 months old). Lovely park, great cabins and lovely staff. We are going back to stay.
Aircons not real outstanding. Need a good clean.  Kids loved the pool, Games room, basketball etc. Nice clean cabin, grounds well kept.
Sehr ruhig bei Nacht. Keine Straße in der Nähe.
Great small caravan park. Very neat and well kept. Disappointed you couldn't use the spa after 5pm.
Such a well maintained park with great facilities. Very well kept nice and clean

I have been to a fair few holiday parks, but none as clean and well presented as this place. We stayed in a miners tent, which was exceptional value and so well appointed. The staff were friendly and helpful and everything was spot on, I could go on about how good it is, but you'll have to see for yourself.

We have stayed for a month in our caravan and the staff are very friendly and helpful. Best park we have stayed at due to the cleanliness, the facilities,  closeness to the CBD, visitor experiences and shopping facilities, and the size of sites are larger than others we have stayed at in the past.

This is a great small caravan park close to town. All the staff, and there are plenty of them, are very friendly and accommodating. The amenities are modern and constantly checked and cleaned. The grounds are immaculately maintained. They have sites for caravans & tents but also have cabins and glamping tents all close to a shaded pool and spa.. They have a communal fire pit lit every night plus organised events for the kids. It was a pleasure to stay here and a credit to management and all the staff.

Stayed there on Sunday night in pooch pad coz we have our paw friend with us and we loved it. Loved the backyard area specially for our dog. Very friendly staff. Highly recommended if you wanna bring your pet with you.
Tidiest and most well-manicured caravan park I have ever been to. The best bit was the sculptural fire pit which diligent staff keep going in the evening.

A great caravan park. Having stayed at parks right across Australia, this one is up there with the best. Lots of facilities for the kids to play including pool, mini golf, games hub, jumping pillow (not cushion), basketball, pedal karts, outdoor playground and indoor playground akin to a mini play centre for the littlies.

The caravan park itself is exceptionally well maintained, with lots of grass and super clean amenities blocks. The caravan sites were not squashed up next to each other with a slab, gravel and a grass patch for all sites.

Loved our stay here and will come back again.
Pretty close to the Bendigo city centre,great facilities

Nice peaceful park.  Good location if the horse racing is on.
Amenities were super modern.  Recommend!!!

Stayed for 4 nights in our motorhome. Excellent services and facilities. The whole park was very well maintained and clean. Staff are friendly and helpful. A relaxing and comfortable experience. Will stay there again.
Pod suited us perfectly for one night. Park and facilities were clean and well kept. Even though it was on a main road the park was quiet.

I recently had the most incredible experience staying in the glamping tents, and I can't recommend it enough! The tents were spotless, beautifully presented, and provided all the comforts you could ask for. The attention to detail was impressive, making it feel like a luxurious escape in the heart of nature. The facilities were fantastic, with everything thoughtfully designed for both families and couples. Whether you’re looking for adventure or relaxation, this place has it all. Do yourself a favor and book your stay – you won't regret it!

One of the tidiest and better organised caravan parks we have stayed at. The staff all knew to their jobs very well and were helpful. Toilet facilities were excellent, there were pads for all sites. The dump point was by far the best I have seen. It's a bit out of central Bendigo, but an easy walk to the Botanical Hotel, which I recommend.
Lovely people and very helpful
Was a friendly and helpful experience from the initial phone call. Thank you Carly you were very helpful to 2 old women on there first motorhome holiday. The ensuites were immaculate.
Can't comment on rooms as I stayed in our camper. Place was great. Plenty to occupy the kids and everything close by. Friendly and helpful staff
Great place to get away. Plenty to occupy the kids and staff are friendly and helpful
Staff were great, wonderful location, great for school holidays
Great sites, roads are wide.  Clean park including all amenities. Staff are extra helpful and friendly.

Nice place to stay. Lots of activities for kids.
Would have been even better if there was less dust as the driveways are gravel.
Perfect place to setup camp and explore.  Well maintained site with friendly staff.
Beautiful place amazing for all age kids

Excellent location not too far from main town , very clean modern and super friendly service.  The kids were so happy with all the facilities.  The playroom, jumping pillows and mini golf were fantastic. Loved the fire 🔥 pit at night.   There is a great pool and entertainment room for games.
Amazing facility, so much for kids to do, hence greater relaxtion time for adults.

Thoroughly enjoyed our time here. The amenities for young families are WONDERFUL - mini golf, jumping pillow/pad, basketball court, indoor and outdoor playground, pool, spa, fire pit with marshmallows and pedal go karts. The kids had a ball here with so much to do without even having to leave the park. We were lucky enough to be in a brand new cabin which was very spacious with a very thought out floorplan and all the amenities you could ask for. Some smaller cabins (2 person) are definitely dated and are closer to the boundary of the racecourse. Staff were friendly and helpful. Will be back!
A great park and perfect stop to stay. We come here in our van and partly for a few days - the place is clean and quiet.
Very nice park, plenty of options
Quiet, family friendly premises. Excellent quality and great value
Great cabin and location 👌

We've stayed here heaps of times. Mostly on a powered Caravan slab site, but also in a 1 bedroom cabin.
Great facilities and activities on-site.
Очень хорошее удобное место.
Wonderful place to stay. Everything is available to everyone and clean and friendly

Stayed in a glamping tent for 2 nights. Fantastic experience at the same price as a hotel room but so much better. Very spacious, extremely clean and has all the luxuries expected.
One suggestion in to include a change machine in the laundry that only takes $1 coins. Will definitely stay again, we loved our time here!
Very clean amenities and immaculate gardens. One of the best parks we have stayed in.  Highly recommended

Had a lovely stay during the busy Lost Trades Fair. Had an ensuite site so really can't comment on amenities however the bbq & camp kitchen was well equipped. In the extreme heat the pool was a godsend each afternoon.

Great friendly park. Cabins were clean, grounds were clean and great for the kids. Sitting around the fire at night is relaxing and the pump track, mini golf and basketball area are really cool to use all year round
Great place to stay with great amenities.
Toller Platz, zu schön für nur 1 Nacht. Alles da was man braucht . SEHR saubere Sanitärräume. Einfach toll.
Just stopped by to have a look. Nice set up.
One of the best parks we've stayed at. Amenities faultless.
I came to Bendigo to attend a reunion. The location suited. The sites & amenities are very clean, tidy and maintained. The receptionist was very welcoming and helpful. I recommend this CP.

Stayed in the caravan park for two days. Having travelled down from Cairns and staying at several caravan parks on the way I would rate this as the best.
Everything was clean and tidy, sites were spacious, amenities spotless.
Admin staff were most welcoming.⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Rooms were clean and tidy, bed was too firm for my liking- but ok.
We had a late check in, instructions for lock box etc were clear and easy to follow.
Plenty of things to do for kids, indoor soft play centre, outside play ground.
Nothing can be said for the pump track and the jumping pillow because staff were late to open it and there were other kids waiting.
- my suggestion would be to open the amenities at 8:30 Atleast. Being a family park most kids/ toddlers have already been up for hours.

stayed in our caravan, just fitted our 23 foot van on our site. The facilities here are one of the best I have seen, huge amenities block clean and newish. massive tv room huge tv and lots of lounges and aircon. lots of tablets and chairs to use. great fire pit (didn't use it) pool and spa which you can book out just for your use (the spa) it was so relaxing. would definitely stay here again
Great park very well presented at all times staff always working to keep it that way.

Lovely friendly staff, great park with everything you need and more. We had the best time. Perfect for families
Would definitely stay again
Only stayed one night. Facilities were very clean and well looked after. Staff friendly and helpful.
Excellent facilities, well maintained and very clean. Loved our stay. Staff were lovely. Thanks!

Exceptional park and service.
Stayed on a powered slab site, which was roomy, with each having their own lawn space and room for a car as well.
Amenities were cleaned multiple times a day.
So much for kids to do, outdoor and indoor play spaces, jumping pillow, bike track, pedal bikes, heated pool and spa as well as their games room and gym spaces.
We stayed during school holidays and there were activities each afternoon for the kids for a gold coin donation toward the cfa.
The staff were amazing, offering local knowledge and advice on what we could do with our 20 month old and were completely professional in every aspect.
Well presented and maintained and really clean toilet/shower amenities
Our favourite Bendigo Holiday Park.

In the middle of January my wife and two crazy boys (20 months and 3 years old) stay on a powered site in our camper. The grounds and sites were immaculately presented and maintained and the park had awesome facilities. Our kids loved the pool, outdoor playground, mini town and indoor play area. The toilets and showers were all cleaned very regularly and the staff were friendly and helpful. We'll definitely be coming back! Thanks Big 4 Tasman Bendigo!

Great caravan park, offered a lot of activities for the kids to do these including jumpy pillow, bike track, play ground, in-door playground, mini golf, pool, spa. There was a fire pit which staff came around and lit and offered marshmallows, the recreation room was huge had a massive TV with comfy seats, pool table, ping pong table and a Xbox on a separate TV. Our stay was in a RV on a paved and grass site, the sites were well maintained and the grass was soft. The safari tents look nice and the cabins looked new and modern definitely a great stay.
Good size  and clean rooms

Due to bad weather destroying our camp site we were in need of alternate accommodation on Christmas eve ..The team at Tasman were amazing and managed to accommodate all 5 of us in a beautiful 3 bedroom cabin .  Made our stay so comfortable and enjoyable. Would definitely recommend this park to everyone.. Thank you Tasman for all your wonderful service..
Quite good. Awkward parking spot.
Caravan powered sites best site with gym  pool dog friendly walk to pub and great Cafe  clean and  above all best  we have ever  visited

OH MY GOSH this park is incredible, the staff were lovely and very accommodating, the facilities were all spotless clean and well maintained. We stayed in a cabin which was very clean and well looked after just like the rest of the park, so many great activities for kids and adults, close to the town center but far enough away that it is quiet, We will definitely be back. Highly recommend
Brilliant park large sites well located. Great staff.
Nice park. But increasing the rate of a powered site from $44 per night to $71 a night just because the caravan and camping show is being held is outright robbery
Beautiful cabin, friendly staff.

Hi must say one of the best parks we have stayed in .Thank you Deb and crew such fantastic service .
The park has amenities for young and old from
lovely pool . mini golf to jumping pillow etc etc etc all i can say pick up phone and book guarantee you will not be disappointed

Geoff & Jude 2022 2nd Time at ASCOT PARK

Last year Bendigo hosted Mary Quant exhibition  this year lots of ELVIS PRESLEY'S clothing-MG -CAR -HARLEYDAVIDSON absolutly fantastic.
As again ASCOT CARAVAH PARK with Deb and her staff.MADE US MOST WELCOME. This park has all the bells and whistles  is a must GO TO PARK.The Botanical gardens 5 Min walk away and the Great Botanical hotel next door great food.
WOULD THOROUGHLY RECOMMEND

Hi here we are again 2023 few changes big 4 to TASMAN HOLIDAY PARK  name change
But same great staff to look after your every needs.
Let us know how you get on go and enjoy you time in Bendigo tell staff Geoff  and Jude sent you .HAPPY HOLIDAYS

Can not recommend highly enough. Cracking setup through out the park. Kids had a blast.
New cabins were beautiful, only suggestion for them would be to put some better exhaust fans in the bathrooms to prevent mould. The ones built into the heat lights are rubbish, speaking from experience !

Will be returning asap !
Great job 🤩
Amazing park. So clean and modern. Staff were amazing. Would love to stay again. Everything was fantastic. Thanks
Great place to stay caravan park has so much for the kids to do you will not regret staying here cabins are so clean great stay
Great CVP. Many upgrades have been done since we started staying here. Highly recommend staying here.
The grounds, amenities, staff. Truly amazing.

Wow the Tasman Big 4 was amazing.  It has restored my faith in Parks after my last experience at Mildura.
Not only is it a beautiful park, the cabins are lovely and so perfectly clean and the staff were absolutely delightful.
Stayed in the studio cabin whilst horses at vets for a few days and perfect size and in a lovely quiet spot and was able to catch up on some much needed rest whilst also doing work.
Would come back in a heartbeat and highly recommend the Tasman Big 4 Bendigo to everyone travelling, you wont be disappointed

This Park is one of the best Big4's I have stayed at. Spotlessly clean, great facilities, cabins are roomy and comfortable beds. Staff are always friendly and approachable. We come here every year and wouldn't stay anywhere else.

Great place for young families! Clean rooms, well maintained showers, common areas and great for place for caravans and camps. They have great glamping tents with cubby house bedding for kids! Great outdoors and play areas for kids. Common areas have table tennis table, billiards and xbox. Jacuzzi and swimming pool are nice too! We absolutely loved our stay here! Staff are very friendly and accomodating!
Couldn't be happier with this holiday park. We only had a short stay but the kids could have happily been entertained there for a week
Very nice place
